title: Fed Gov. Waller Champions Stablecoins and Dismisses CBDCs
message_html: Fed Gov. Waller Champions Stablecoins and Dismisses CBDCs ...
snippet: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller is promoting stablecoin usage while blasting central bank digital currencies. During a speech Sunday (May 31) in Croatia, Waller said the global spread of stablecoins could increase the influence of U.S. central bank policy. “Countries that adopt it, it’s
